Instruction: Make it dramatic.
Transcript: This is Julius Caesar.
Elements: audio_1(type=music), image_1(type=image, about=Caesar portrait), caption_track_1(type=caption)
Duration hint: 2.0s Grouping rule: Build caption groups adaptively from neighboring word gaps; split on long pauses, split at sentence boundaries (.!?), split when the next word starts with an uppercase letter, allow 1 to 5 words per group, and set each group start to the first word start and end to the next group first-word start (last group ends at last word end). Highlighting rule: highlight only the important word(s), never tint the full caption sentence.

EDIT PLAN
Global Style: Dramatic historical opener, dark cinematic background, bold captions.
Audio Decision: Use audio_1 from 0.0-2.0 at full volume.
Caption Style: Bottom-center, white text, gold highlight for key phrase, max 3 words/group.
Visual Style: Caption-focused with single reveal beat.
Background Style: Dark red-black gradient.
Segmentation Rule: One segment for single-sentence hook.
Segment 1
Time: 0.0-2.0
Purpose: Reveal Julius Caesar dramatically.
Elements Used: audio_1, image_1, caption_track_1
Caption Decision: Show "This is" then emphasize "Julius Caesar" with longer hold.
Visual Decision: Reveal image_1 exactly on "Julius Caesar".
Animation Decision: subtle_zoom on image_1, pop emphasis on key phrase.
Placement Decision: image_1 upper-center, captions lower third safe zone.
Timing Events: - time:0.9 event:highlight Julius Caesar
Transition Out: Quick dark cut.
Engagement Note: Immediate name reveal creates retention hook.
